details: The agent ran multiple kubectl-axi commands against the cluster and correctly identified both required elements: (1) the rollout is stuck with ProgressDeadlineExceeded because the v2 ReplicaSet's pod is in ImagePullBackOff, and (2) the root cause is the non-existent image 'nginx:2.0-does-not-exist'. The agent also correctly explained why users still see v1 — the 3 old pods running nginx:1.27-alpine remain active since the rolling update is blocked. All findings are directly supported by the command outputs.
